title: axy's Traditional Armor
description: Reimagines the Programmer Art armor textures with a fresh coat of paint!
body:
## Traditional Armor
![A showcase of the pack's new Diamond armor set and Netherite armor set textures on a wooden board. A parrot says "skibidi rizz" on top of the board.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84d985841bcc75eeef3abdaa73097bb1e28f6a40.png)

###  So what does this texture pack do?
This texture pack brings back the old Programmer Art armor textures and gives them a fresh coat of paint! This includes the original **Leather**, **Chain**, **Iron**, **Gold**, and **Diamond** armor sets, as well as retrofitting the new **Netherite** and **Copper** armor sets to don a nostalgic feel they never had!

NOTE: This pack is **not a port of the Programmer Art textures**, as these new textures have the 1.14 JAPPA Art colour palettes.


###  Additional details
- This pack is expected to work as intended for versions beyond 1.20.x
- This pack may or may not be subject to errors on **versions below 1.20.x** 
- Mods are not required to use this pack
- Submit a support request on my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/HZbvM2KBnR) if you encounter any issues

###  Social links
- Want to support me? Send a tip over on my [Ko-fi page](ko-fi.com/axyeatsrocks)! :D
- Join my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/HZbvM2KBnR) if you wish to get updates on my texture packs!
